Title: You decide when you receive ForwardPass! (experimental)

URL Source: https://forwardpasstechnology.substack.com/p/you-decide-when-you-receive-forwardpass

Published Time: 2026-05-21T06:35:15+00:00

Markdown Content:
[![Image 1](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!xpg6!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fe6043e91-3cda-4377-ae8f-9e2ed361fc95.tif)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!xpg6!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fe6043e91-3cda-4377-ae8f-9e2ed361fc95.tif)

At some point over the last weekend I realised that ForwardPass had hit 100 subscribers (in a week!).

As per the graphic, I also came to realise two of the limitations plaguing fledgling newsletters:

1.   You must publish each post simultaneously across the globe, so an optimal moment for one time-zone is middle-of-the-night for another and subscribers have no say on this time!

2.   Your subscribers are locked into a frequency of receiving newsletters the author decides (ie weekly or monthly). This does not cater to subscribers who are keen on your content, but prefer a a different cadence (ie fortnightly instead of weekly)

So, I have developed an experimental delivery method for ForwardPass that addresses both of these limitations - the **ForwardPass MCP, which you can add to your AI of choice right now!**

Select "Customize" on the left-hand sidebar → Connectors → Press "+" -> Add Custom Connector → toggle Developer Mode ON → Create App → Type Name: ForwardPass MCP & paste in Remote MCP server URL: [https://mcp.forwardpasstechnology.com/mcp](https://mcp.forwardpasstechnology.com/mcp) → Click "Add" -> In a new chat, press "+" -> Connectors -> Toggle ForwardPass MCP to ON

Settings → Apps → Advanced Settings → toggle Developer Mode ON → Create App → paste MCP URL: [https://mcp.forwardpasstechnology.com/mcp](https://mcp.forwardpasstechnology.com/mcp) → App name: "ForwardPass MCP" → Description: "ForwardPass AI Update" → Save/Create App.

NB: Enable developer mode at your own risk

*   Ask your AI “how to schedule the ForwardPass MCP connector” - you can determine the delivery time and frequency

*   When your AI runs as scheduled - it will dynamically create a newsletter in the familiar ForwardPass format but it’ll ensure the most important articles in the time-frame your specified are included

Please let me know your experience and thoughts!
